specific_question: How many external brands collaborated with Elexion Automotive on Q4 2025 co-branded EV accessory promotions?
answer: According to Elexion internal marketing reports, three lifestyle and tech brands partnered with Elexion in Q4 2025 to promote co-branded EV accessories, including charging stations, seat covers, and interior lighting kits.
